summary: Completed testing notification system endpoints and frontend integration. Backend notification APIs working properly with mocked data, frontend NotificationCenter component exists but login integration has issues preventing full UI testing.

minor_issues.issue: Gemini API key configuration missing or invalid

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submission not working - stays on login page after clicking ENTRAR

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login not connecting properly to backend auth endpoint

passed_tests: NotificationCenter component loads and renders properly
Frontend serves login page correctly at /hestia path
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login integration - login form appears to submit but doesn't authenticate properly with backend. Backend auth endpoints work fine via API testing but frontend login form fails to complete authentication flow.

success_percentage.backend: 90% - All notification endpoints working, only AI chat failing due to API key
success_percentage.frontend: 30% - Login form renders but authentication fails, preventing testing of NotificationCenter interactions
